Name: Trener Robotics (formerly T-ROBOTICS)
Description:
Trener Robotics is a Physical AI company building the intelligence layer for industrial robots. Headquartered in San Jose, California and Trondheim, Norway, we transform robots from rigid, scripted machines into intelligent, self-learning systems that operate reliably in real production environments. Our approach replaces traditional point-to-point programming with training rather than hard-coding, enabling greater flexibility and autonomy.

At the core of our platform is Acteris, a standard robot operating brain and integration suite that powers a growing library of production-ready skills. Built on foundation models that combine vision, language, and action understanding, Acteris enables intuitive, scalable automation while keeping deployments repeatable through trusted partners.

To advance embodied intelligence, we operate T-Labs, our dedicated R&D engine for robotic skill development and validation. Together, Acteris and T-Labs enable software-defined automation that delivers unprecedented adaptability on the factory floor.

Name: Remedy Robotics
Description:
Remedy Robotics exists to bring flawless, immediate, endovascular intervention (EI)—treatment for stroke, heart attack, bleeding, aneurysmal disease, pulmonary embolism and more— to every patient worldwide. Remedy is the only company in the world to have performed:
- Completely robotic neurointerventional procedures in humans from start to finish.
- Completely remote robotic neurointerventional procedures in humans from from start to finish.
- Autonomous endovascular navigation.

A few key principles underlie our work. We strongly believe that:
- EI is optimizable. Tool movements should be deliberate and efficient. Procedures should be fast and effective. Complications should be avoided without exception.
- All patients at elite US institutions deserve access to flawless EI without delay. But so do all patients at smaller US community hospitals. And so do all patients in Kinshasa and Port Moresby and Alice Springs and anywhere in the world.
- The world's finest technology and technologists should focus on advancing our health and wellbeing. They belong at Remedy Robotics.

Name: HUMANOID ROBOTICS LIMITED

Name: MVP Robotics, Inc.
Description:
MVP Robotics began as a collaboration between Dartmouth head football coach Buddy Teevens and a group of engineers and athletes from Dartmouth's Thayer School of Engineering and together they developed the world’s first robotic tackling dummy to help reduce unnecessary contacts and the incidence of injuries suffered during football and other sporting practices.  In the first 2 years of the robotic tackling dummies (MVP|DRIVES) being available, MVP completely sold out of their MVP|DRIVES to half the NFL, 40+ colleges, and more than 75 high schools.  At Dartmouth, concussions were reduced by 58% in the first two seasons of implementing the MVP|DRIVES into practice.  The MVP|DRIVES are designed to accurately simulate the size and performance of a human, weighing 190 lbs and reaching speeds of 17 mph.

Following the successful development and introduction of the world’s first robotic tackling dummy (MVP|DRIVE) for football, MVP has continued developing their patented robotic system to create HEKTR (Humanoid Engageable Kinetic Training Robot) in order to fit the realistic tactical training needs of the warfighter.  HEKTR is a remote-control, fully armored, all-terrain, and responsive live-fire target that simulates a realistic environment by reaching speeds over 20 mph and providing instantaneous feedback to the shooter.  The HEKTR platform is a versatile training tool that forces quick reaction and fluid decision making from operators in any setting, including: house, urban, woodland, desert, ice/snow, and sand.  Through the HEKTR mobile app, operators are able to control and customize their training scenarios and thereby integrate HEKTR’s capabilities as part of larger training evolutions.

#RoboticGen #Academy #Labs #Robotics #AI

Name: ETH RobotX

Name: OORB Open Organic Robotics
Description:
OORB, standing for Open Organic Robotics, is a revolutionary Tunisian startup, 8 months old, that comprises the OORB framework, the OORB Robodog quadruped educational kit, and the OORB community.

Our open-source framework for advanced robotics development offers a suite of fully cloud-based tools. It features an intuitive graphical interface for designing and prototyping, multi-language programming support, and a CAD designer for modular part editing. Leveraging AI-driven tools and a powerful chatbot assistant built on Auto Generative Transformers and a RAG of ROS, OORB allows users to write in natural languages to directly generate code, components, and services, all while receiving educational resources and an HDL code generator for hardware deployment. The platform supports real-time collaboration, simulation capabilities, monitoring, and control, bundling projects to ROS for efficient and effective innovation.

The OORB Robodog quadruped educational kit is an open-source, 3D-printed robot designed to kickstart your learning experience on OORB. Our vibrant community is built around enthusiasts and open-source principles, where we also undertake paid robotics projects and offer 3D printing services. Join us in revolutionizing robotics education and development!

Name: PBA Group
Description:
PBA are the leading experts in ultra-precision motion control and mechatronic solutions, providing cutting-edge technologies designed to deliver unmatched accuracy and performance. 

With close to 40 years of expertise, our team is dedicated to developing innovative precision motion solutions that integrate mechanical engineering, electronics, and advanced control systems for a wide range of industries, including semiconductor, automation, photonics/optics, and medical devices.
Our solutions ensure ultra-precise movement, reliability, and efficiency, meeting the most demanding application requirements. Whether you need high-performance motion control, custom mechatronic designs, or integration services, we are committed to delivering tailored solutions that push the boundaries of what's possible.

PBA specialises in direct drive products, as well as high and ultra-precision precision motion solutions, with cutting-edge technology at the forefront of our motion automation expertise. Our system partners and OEM machine builders look for PBA to elevate their solutions for exceptional precision, reliability, and innovation in motion control and mechatronics. 

PBA Group has over 15 owned and operated facilities worldwide and more than 450 employees regionally, with a strong Asia focus and growing global presence. For more information on PBA Systems, please visit www.pbasystems.com.sg

Name: T-ROBOTICS
Description:
T-ROBOTICS is a pioneering AI-driven robotics software company, headquartered in Silicon Valley, USA, and Trondheim, Norway. The company is redefining automation with built-in robotic intelligence, empowering industries to achieve unprecedented flexibility, adaptability, and autonomy in robotic operations.

Built on over a decade of ground-breaking research and development, T-ROBOTICS fundamentally reimagines how robots are programmed. Traditional “point-to-point” programming — the industrial standard since the 1960s — is slow, rigid, and fragile. T-ROBOTICS replaces it with ActGPT, an AI-powered platform with pre-trained skills for industrial robots, delivering effortless automation adoption and execution with zero learning curve.

By combining generative AI, computer vision, and adaptive control, ActGPT enables robots to understand context, plan intelligently, and execute complex industrial tasks autonomously — from machining and assembly to inspection and material handling. This shift empowers manufacturers to scale automation faster, reduce downtime, and achieve continuous improvement without reliance on expert programmers.

Name: Alpha Subsea
Description:
A Alpha Subsea é a extensão dos limites humanos debaixo d'água. 

Com mais de duas décadas trabalhando com operações de robótica subaquática, gerenciando projetos complexos e operando em mais de 6 países, desenvolvemos nossos equipamentos de ROVs unindo a uma equipe especializada e comprometida em entregar resultados. 

Nosso foco é fornecer operações robóticas subaquáticas com pessoal qualificado. Desenvolvemos projetos sob demanda para atender nossos Clientes de forma eficiente e personalizada, fornecendo equipamentos e um time de rápida mobilização, além de proporcionar segurança, retorno financeiro e os melhores resultados. 

Deixe nossa experiência mergulhar por você!

Name: INTI-TECH
Description:
Inti-Tech desarrolla soluciones de limpieza en seco para maximizar la eficiencia de las plantas solares.

Nuestros clientes pueden elegir entre tres tecnologías según las necesidades de su proyecto: SmartDuster, nuestro robot 100% automático; DusterFlex, un sistema semi automático de alta eficiencia; y SunSight, nuestro robot especializado para la limpieza de piranómetros.

Entonces, ¿por qué existen tan pocas alternativas realmente “waterless”?
Porque alcanzar un desempeño seguro, consistente y escalable sin utilizar agua es un desafío de ingeniería mucho mayor: requiere resolver temas de diseño, control, seguridad operativa y rendimiento que pocas empresas están en condiciones de abordar.

En Inti-Tech asumimos ese desafío.
Desarrollamos tecnología que limpia más, contamina menos y optimiza la operación solar del futuro.
Location: La Reina, Región Metropolitana de Santiago

Name: Sensodrive GmbH
Description:
Sensodrive is a high-tech German company specialising in the development of torque sensors and robotic drives with integrated torque measurement and control. As a spin-off from the German Aerospace Centre (DLR), the company was a pioneer of human-robot collaboration with its patented torque sensors and is still a market leader in technology today. Sensodrive's expertise can now be found in almost all cobots worldwide. 

Sensodrive's innovative torque technologies not only set standards in industrial robotics, but also in medical technology, the automotive sector and force-feedback solutions. With the development of the sensitive, torque-controlled SensoJoint drive unit, the company is the only global provider of complete drive modules, that can be integrated into any sensitive robotics and force-feedback using Plug & Play. The company has been fully certified in all important safety standards from 2024. This enables any company to develop cobots and medical robots within a very short timeframe, skipping years of development and certification processes.

Advantages of SensoJoint drive units at a glance:

•	Torque-controlled 
•	Sensitive 
•	Ready to install
•	Fully safety-certified (from Q1/2024) 
•	Powerful 
•	Compact, light and robust 
•	Highly precise 
•	Easily integrated
•	High quality and secure supply chains thanks to production within Germany

Name: KratoX
Description: KratoX is an innovative robotics hardware and software development company. Today, we specialize in building research robots for Robotics researchers in universities and schools worldwide, yet our vision extends far beyond these classes of products. We are committed to redefining the AI-Robots industry and contribute severely to the fields of Embodied AI, Agentic Robots and AI-powered Humanoid Robots and revolutionise the world through cutting-edge Robotic softwares, Hardwares and extraordinary user experiences.

Name: Nature Robots
Description:
Nature Robots aims to support regenerative and ecological agriculture through AI and robotics in harmony with nature and humans.
Nature Robots develops autonomous robots for regenerative agriculture. Based on the specially designed and built long-term autonomous monitoring robot Lero, high-resolution three-dimensional plant maps of vegetables and other plant crops, as well as weeds, are created and migrated into a monitoring user interface for agronomists, farmers, and plant breeders. The AI and robotics systems allow for use in natural and arbitrary-structured environments, such as vegetable production, orcharding, and viticulture, as well as in agroforestry, forestry, photovoltaic, and agrophotovoltaic environments. Customer benefits range from the reduction of workload to an enhanced productivity of the agricultural system.
Nature Robots is a spin-off of the German Research Center for Artificial Intelligence (DFKI) and was founded in January 2022 in Osnabrück.

Name: GENBA | Robotics
Description:
Welcome to Genba, your partner for innovative robotics and automation solutions. We provide turn key solutions and outsourced specialized engineering services to help businesses keep up with the increasing demand for robotics across various industries.
At Genba, we pride ourselves on delivering cutting-edge solutions that meet the needs of our clients. Our team of experts stays on top of the latest technologies. We integrate Robotics, AI, Machine Vision, and IoT technologies to create cutting-edge solutions.

Name: WECOBOTS
Description:
WECOBOTS aporta a tu empresa soluciones a problemas diarios mediante la robótica colaborativa que aporta tecnología de automatización flexible y escalable, que permite la interacción continuada entre operarios y cobots, que se adapta a espacios muy reducidos, como nunca se había podido antes, y con un rápido retorno de la inversión. 

Con esto estamos contribuyendo a la mejora de la competitividad de la industria local y al acercamiento de la tecnología a sectores menos acostumbrados a la automatización. 

Somos expertos en la integración de cobots, lo demostramos con ejemplos de instalaciones ya entregadas con las que resolvemos problemas, entre otros, de hergonomia, de falta de personal suficiente y cualificado, de calidad, aportando soluciones  para estos problemas y diferentes procesos industriales de sectores diversos.

Nacimos de WETRON automation technology, empresa con 50 años de experiencia, 300+ empleados y aporta soluciones 'llaves en mano' de automatización, control y gestión de la información para la industria. 

Estamos en Rubí (Barcelona) incluido despacho de ingeniería y diseño y unas instalaciones donde realizamos pre-montajes, pruebas y demos para plena satisfacción de nuestros clientes antes de la entrega definitiva. 


NUESTRA VISIÓN
Una solución inteligente. 

“Los robots colaborativos representan una extraordinaria oportunidad para cualquier empresa industrial. Son una solución inteligente, tanto para el que acomete la inversión como para los empleados que se encuentran a pie de línea”

P. Valles
Consejero Delegado

WECOBOTS es un equipo humano altamente cualificado, apasionado y experimentado en la resolución de problemas diarios mediante el uso de la robótica colaborativa. 

En nuestro Linked In hablamos de gente, de problemas y de soluciones con cobots. 

Aprende viendo como otros han resuelto problemas como los tuyos en nuestro canal youtube.

Name: SAR Elektronic GmbH
Description:
SAR Group –  Wertschöpfung durch Automatisierung

Die SAR Group ist seit 1985 Ihr zuverlässiger Partner für professionelle Industrie- und Prozessautomatisierung. Mit Hauptsitz in Dingolfing (Bayern) und über 600 Mitarbeitenden weltweit bietet SAR maßgeschneiderte Lösungen für verschiedenste Branchen – von der Automobilindustrie bis zur Energieversorgung.

Unsere Kompetenzbereiche umfassen Automatisierungstechnik, Umwelttechnik, Prüf- und Messtechnik, IT-Dienstleistungen, Oberflächenapplikation, Kunststoffsysteme sowie Green Energy. Wir realisieren Projekte als schlüsselfertige Gesamtlösungen – inklusive mechanischer Komponenten, eigener Entwicklungen und Produkte. Ergänzt wird unser Angebot durch Schaltschrankbau, Montage, Schulung und After-Sales-Service.

SAR steht für kundenindividuelle Systemlösungen, die durch interdisziplinäre Teams entwickelt werden – flexibel, vernetzt und zukunftsorientiert. Zu unseren Kunden zählen internationale Industrieunternehmen, Energieversorger, mittelständische Betriebe sowie kommunale Einrichtungen.

Mehr unter: www.sar.biz

Name: Twara Robotics
Description:
Twara Robotics specializes in designing Robotic Joint Actuators and Soft Grippers which comprise the fundamental components of most robotic systems. We use the same expertise to design robotic systems including but not limited to Robotic Arms, AMR Kits, and Conveyor Drives.
Twara Robotics (previously Gati Robotics) is a venture under ARTPARK (I-Hub @ IISc) seed funded by Department Of Science & Technology and Government of Karnataka. Being a part of the CAMRAS accelerator under Ministry of Heavy Industries, Twara Robotics aims to enable automation for every industry, agnostic of its size.

Name: Flyby Robotics
Description:
Flyby Robotics is an autonomous drone system developer.

To join the team, check out our website: https://www.flybydev.com

Name: ALDEBARAN
Description: Aldebaran is a major player in interaction robotics, and the manufacturer of the iconic NAO and Pepper robots. Aldebaran designs, develops and manufactures robots with passion! Since its creation in 2005, it has become the market leader in humanoid robots. More than 40,000 social and interaction robots are in use in around 70 countries, in a variety of sectors ranging from retail and tourism to healthcare and education. Aldebaran aims to lead the way and unify the human robot experience, and create cohesion between social and industrial robots. In 2022 Aldebaran launched Plato, the next-generation service robot, designed around CobiotX technologies and a patented safety system. With Plato, repetitive, heavy, lifting and transport tasks are automated, improving the health and well-being of staff in the hotel/restaurant industry and other sectors (healthcare, etc). These developments mobilise a wide range of skills (electronics, mechanics, software, cybersecurity, project management, etc.) within the R&D and Industrialisation teams. Aldebaran is headquartered in Paris 15.

Name: AKEOPLUS
Description:
AKEOPLUS build with companies’ end-to-end strategy for short term growth and profitability. We provide our 3 skills in each strategic and technological project: Digital, Automation & Safety, in order to lead industrial companies to the SmartFAB.
Through each project, we develop our customers strength through product, service and processes digitalization, and through to smart and scalable process automation.


More information www.akeoplus.com

Name: MPG epmc
Description: MPG epmc work on Development Digital Business

Name: Arabian Robotics and ROS Meetup
Description:
The ROS Arab Meetup is an educational community dedicated to teaching robotics, ROS (Robot Operating System), and AI to Arab individuals. We are a group of passionate and talented people from across the Middle East, united by our vision to share knowledge and skills in these cutting-edge fields. Our goal is to build a strong community that fosters learning, innovation, and growth, allowing us to develop our unique identity within the global tech landscape.

Whether you are a beginner eager to learn or an expert willing to share, we welcome you to join us on this exciting journey. To be part of this growing community, just message us!

Name: Oshen
Description:
Oshen is a start-up that aims to use autonomous micro-vessels for en-masse ocean data collection. 

We want to fill in the areas of the ocean where we have sparse data coverage. Our vessels are small and simple enough to be deployed en-masse, but smart enough to stay in position or track a desired path, giving high quality data.

Name: AION ROBOTICS CORPORATION
Description: Our rugged autonomous vehicles bring Industry 4.0 to outdoor commercial jobsites through the automation of infrastructure monitoring, maintenance and inspection tasks.

Name: The Rubic
Description: The Rubic is at the forefront of warehouse automation, marrying AI and advanced robotics to redefine industry standards. Our flagship product, Freedom Pick, streamlines the box-picking process, enhancing efficiency and reducing operational costs. With AI-driven vision systems, unique arm designs, and state-of-the-art mobility, Freedom Pick ensures faster, safer, and more reliable warehouse operations. Join the next-gen revolution with The Rubic, where innovation meets functionality.

Name: Control One | AI Startup
Description: Control One AI converts field-proven, slow-moving equipment into advanced physical AI agents, and recently debuted India’s first physical AI agent, an autonomous forklift for warehouses. Powered by our operating system, these agents are capable of real-time decision-making using digital twin technology, revolutionizing machine-environment interaction with adaptive, human-like responsiveness.

Name: HelloWorld Robotics
Description:
We design and build autonomous delivery networks and infrastructure to offer smarter, safer, and more cost-effective last-mile delivery solutions.

HelloWorld Robotics also provides customized self-driving robotic systems, including mechanical, electrical, and software design services.

Name: Devonics Automation
Description:
Elevating Industry Standards with Cutting-Edge Robotics 

At Devonics Automation, we're the forefront of innovation, distributing the globe's most advanced robotic arms. Our commitment to excellence extends beyond mere distribution – we specialize in the meticulous design and production of end effectors and accessories that seamlessly integrate with diverse manufacturing and laboratory environments.

Our expertise spans the entire spectrum, from crafting the mechanical structure of end effectors to developing hardware programming tailored to drive any task. With Devonics Automation, you're not just investing in equipment – you're investing in a partnership dedicated to pushing the boundaries of what's possible in automation.  #Robotics #Innovation #EngineeringExcellence

Name: Team Mavericks - Robotics Club, SLIET
Description:
Team Mavericks is the official robotics club based at Sant Longowal Institute of Engineering and Technology (SLIET). It provides an ideal platform for students of Mechanical, Mechatronics, Electronics, Computers and Electrical Engineering background to hone their skills and showcase their talent in many interdisciplinary activities.



Our Objectives:

• To promote creativity and to increase the technical know-how and productivity of all the students at the Institute under one umbrella.

• To promote hands-on and co-operative learning and also engages students in problem solving and higher order thinking for Industrial Oriented Projects & preparation for various competition organized all over India.

• To develop the spirit of entrepreneurship among the students of Institute.



Our Achievements:

• Won in Smart India Hackathon (SIH) in 2019, 2020.

• Two teams qualified for the zonal rounds of DRDO’s Unmanned Vehicle Challenge.

• Among the top teams in the E-YANTRA 2017, 2018, 2019 competition jointly by Ministry of Education, MoE (Formerly:MHRD) and IIT, Bombay in 2017, 2018, 2019.

• Spreaded glories at various technical fests, including IIT Bombay, IIT Kanpur, IIT Delhi, IIT BHU, IIT Roorkee, IIT Ropar, PEC , Thapar University,BFGI Bhatinda & received cash prize at GNDU Amritsar.

Name: Octobotics Tech
Description:
Overview:
Octobotics Tech pioneers' innovative robotic solutions tailored for the maritime and oil & gas industries. Our cutting-edge technologies are designed to revolutionize inspection and maintenance processes, ensuring efficiency, safety, and precision in challenging environments.

Services Offered:

Robotic Inspection Services:  Utilizing state-of-the-art robotics, we conduct thorough inspections of maritime and oil & gas infrastructure. Our specialized robots navigate complex structures, providing detailed assessments while minimizing human risk.

Maintenance Solutions:  Octobotics offers advanced robotic maintenance services, optimizing asset management and enhancing operational reliability. Our robots execute precision-based maintenance tasks, reducing downtime and operational costs significantly.

Customized Robotic Solutions: We collaborate closely with clients to develop tailored robotic solutions addressing specific industry challenges. Our agile approach ensures that our technology meets unique operational requirements.

Key Features:

Innovation: We leverage cutting-edge technology, including AI, machine learning, and robotics, to deliver innovative solutions that exceed industry standards.
Safety and Efficiency:  Octobotics prioritizes safety and operational efficiency, deploying robots to perform tasks that are hazardous or time-consuming for humans.
Cost-effectiveness: Our solutions streamline processes, reducing overall operational costs and optimizing asset performance for our clients.
Mission:
At Octobotics Tech, our mission is to pioneer technological advancements that transform traditional industry practices. We strive to be the leading provider of robotic solutions, empowering industries to operate more safely, efficiently, and sustainably.

Connect with Us:
Join us in revolutionizing the maritime and oil & gas sectors with cutting-edge robotics. Follow us on LinkedIn for updates on our latest innovations and industry insights.

Name: Sager
Description:
Sager is an all-in-one geospatial data partner, simplifying the entire process of capturing, analyzing and visualizing data via a cloud-based platform. Our goal is to help enterprises spanning various industries integrate aerial technologies (like drones, manned aircraft and satellite imagery) into their diverse workflows to obtain high-quality data, convert it into actionable insights and make informed AI-powered decisions that drive growth and efficiency. 

 

We meticulously crafted a dynamic ecosystem - centered on our cloud-based platform, SagerSpace - to synchronize advanced aerial technologies, robust data management and AI-driven insights, setting the stage for a future where aerial data becomes integral to every enterprise’s operations and scaling plans.  

 

With Sager, you don’t just observe from a distance; you step into the bigger picture, where data-driven possibilities are limitless.

Name: Contoro Robotics
Description: Contoro Robotics is an Austin-based robotics startup that is revolutionizing industrial automation with AI-powered robots, focused on automating the unloading of floor-loaded trailer and shipping containers from trucks. Their pioneering human-in-the-loop (HITL) model ensures over 99% success in real-world applications, bridging the gap between AI limitations and the commercial viability of advanced robotics solutions.

Name: PSYONIC
Description: PSYONIC is an advanced bionics company that is creating fully integrated, super-charged extensions for humans and robotics systems. Fully adaptable and incredibly affordable.

Name: Klynk
Description:
At Klynk (by Futuristic Labs), we’re transforming cooking through intelligent automation. By building a connected ecosystem of hardware, software, and services, we’re making cooking more accessible, enjoyable, and efficient for everyone.

Our mission is to accelerate cooking to Level 5 autonomy. Where cooking becomes effortless while preserving its creative and cultural essence. At Klynk, we’re not just building products; we’re reimagining how people interact with their kitchens.

Our Ecosystem
Riku: The world’s first automatic rice and curry maker, enabling hands-free, worry-free cooking.  https://www.klynk.in/products/riku
Semi: India’s first intelligent induction cooktop, your culinary Navigator for guided precision. https://www.klynk.in/products/semi
Klynk.Recipes: A platform for creators to share and monetize their culinary expertise. https://www.klynk.in/products/recipe-platform
Klynk.App: Your ultimate kitchen companion for meal planning, shopping, and cooking. https://www.klynk.in/products/app

Why Build with Us?
Real-World Impact: Tackle problems that transform millions of kitchens worldwide.
Cutting-Edge Technology: Innovate across IoT, AI, and automation.
Collaborative Growth: Work with experts from diverse fields.
Ownership & Purpose: Drive initiatives with autonomy and accountability.

Our Values
Optimism: Boldly tackle challenges.
Innovation: Experiment with new solutions.
Growth: Invest in professional development.
Radical Candor: Foster open communication.
Selflessness: Succeed and grow as a team.
Located in Hyderabad, our innovation hub is equipped with prototyping labs and a facility capable of producing 500 units weekly. Here, ideas become reality.

Since 2017, we’ve grown from a small team to a 60-member organization, raising $1.7M USD along the way. Backed by visionary investors, we’re scaling rapidly.

If you’re passionate about building the future of cooking, we’d love to hear from you.

 Learn More: klynk.in
 Location: Hyderabad, India

Name: SAFELOG
Description: Since 1996, we have been passionately working on the development and intelligent linking of innovative logistics systems. Starting with our first patent for a pick-by-light solution, which we have been continuously developing for over 25 years now, we have established ourselves on the market with various products in the field of intralogistics. Our portfolio of mobile robots enables, for example, the customer-specific handling of complex transport and supply tasks both in shuttle operation and in production lines. We do not use a higher-level control center, but instead rely on agent-based control with swarm intelligence. This allows us to implement projects with just a few robots as well as with swarms of several hundred SAFELOG robots without incurring high costs for a control center or additional control software. Our solutions are used in production, distribution, and order picking in a wide range of industries, such as automotive, electrical engineering, and mechanical engineering. As a software-based system provider, we can respond flexibly and quickly to customer-specific requests and implement them together with you.

Name: Greensea IQ
Description:
At Greensea IQ, we are redefining the future of subsea robotics through cutting-edge solutions tailored to the Defense and Maritime industries. Our innovative technologies empower operators with unmatched autonomy, precision, and control in complex underwater environments.

In Defense, we provide advanced systems such as the Bayonet AUGVs, EOD Workspace, Safe C2, and our Integrated Robotics and Navigation System (IQNS). These tools are designed for critical applications including UXO (Unexploded Ordnance) inspection, EOD (Explosive Ordnance Disposal) and Mine Countermeasures (MCM), as well as Intelligence, Surveillance, and Reconnaissance (ISR). Our systems ensure safety and efficiency in the most demanding subsea missions.

For the Maritime sector, we offer the EverClean service and EverClean IQ, a comprehensive platform for automated hull cleaning and inspection. Our cutting-edge inspection capabilities allow for accurate assessments both above and below the waterline, improving operational readiness while reducing maintenance costs.

At Greensea IQ, we are dedicated to advancing underwater operations, with a commitment to innovation, safety, and sustainability. We don’t just build technology – we lead the industry in making the oceans more accessible, clean, and secure.

Name: SWARM Biotactics
Description:
We build Physical AI at biological scale.

Swarm Biotactics pioneers a new era of robotics, integrating biology with advanced engineering to create bio-robots for mission-critical applications. Our technology uses nature’s unmatched efficiency—enhanced by AI, swarm coordination, and real-time data processing—to operate where conventional robotics can’t scale.

With a foundation in deep-tech innovation and strategic execution, we bridge decades of scientific research with scalable, field-ready solutions. From defense and ISR to search & rescue and industrial operations, SWARM Biotactics is redefining the frontier of autonomous intelligence.

Name: German Bionic
Description: German Bionic is a European robotics firm that develops and manufactures AI-powered exosuits and other wearable technologies. It was the world’s first company to deliver connected exoskeletons for the workplace, applying self-learning and augmented artificial intelligence to support lifting movements and prevent poor posture, and thereby becoming an intelligent link between humans and machines. The German Bionic smart power suits and wearables protect the health of workers and markedly reduce the risk of accidents and injury to consequently improve work processes. In recognition of this innovative technology, which puts people back at the center of Industry 5.0, German Bionic has received numerous awards, including the CES 2023 “Best of Innovation” Award, the Fast Company “Innovation by Design Award”, the German Entrepreneur Award, and a nomination for the prestigious Hermes Award at the Hannover Messe. Headquartered in Augsburg, Germany, German Bionic has offices across Europe, North America, and Asia.

Name: Niryo
Description:
Niryo is a French manufacturer of robotic solutions, headquartered in the north of France.

We design and produce robotic arms and automation cells that combine hardware, software, and integration to help professionals and manufacturers automate repetitive tasks efficiently with solutions that are flexible, accessible, and easy to deploy.

With more than 3,500 robots deployed across 70 countries, we are also a recognized player in the Education sector, thanks to our NED platform — a complete learning ecosystem (hardware, application software, and educational content) tailored to the needs of schools, universities, and training centers in France and worldwide.

Backed by a team of 50 passionate collaborators and a fully integrated value chain, we develop robotics that is designed and manufactured in France, with a clear focus on usability and accessibility.

Name: Telexistence
Description:
“TELEXISTENCE” is a concept that was first proposed in 1980 by Dr. Susumu Tachi, Professor Emeritus of the University of Tokyo and the chairman of TX inc, which refers to the notion of humans being in a place other than where he or she actually exists and being able to act freely in that remote environment – essentially expanding the presence of human beings – as well as the technological systems that make this possible.

Our mission at TX inc is to change robotics, change structures, and change the world.

テレイグジスタンス（TELEXISTENCE/遠隔存在）とは、TX incの創業者の一人でTX会長でもある東京大学名誉教授 舘暲氏が1980年に世界で初めて提唱した、人間が、自分自身が現存する場所とは異なった場所に実質的に存在し、その場所で自在に行動するという人間の存在拡張の概念であり、また、それを可能とするための技術体系です。 TX incのミッションは、ロボットを変え、構造を変え、世界をかえることです。

Name: Robotics Institute Germany
Description: AI-Powered Robotics Made in Germany

Name: Goat Robotics
Description: Goat Robotics, where innovation meets automation in India! From education to heavy industries, our powerful mobile robots handle payloads of up to several tons, enabling Make in India. Join us on our mission to revolutionize education to industries and elevate the future of robotics.

Name: Hellenic Technology of Robotics (HTR)
Description:
HTR comes from the early foundations of field robotics, applied for space.  Space robotics is an extremely challenging domain, currently in full evolution. HTR, with decades of accumulated prototyping experience, focuses on two relevant pillars of space robotics, planetary exploration and in-orbit services. We pride ourselves for our ability to adapt and take up engineering challenges for these domains, maintaining our core principles of rigorous tests and design iterations for a successful study.
HTR is based in Greece, maintaining subsidiaries across Europe to allow for easy collaboration with international partners.
Over the past years we have focused on developing,  patenting and commercializing an all metal, elastic, variable stiffness rover wheel for planetary exploration, managing to out-perform all similar wheels currently on the market.  For in-orbit servicing, we developed and patented a revolutionary docking system guaranteeing safe, low cost approach, detection, capturing and locking on unprepared, non cooperative targets, ranging from 100 to thousands of kg..
We aspire to provide our solutions to the fast growing Lunar Exploration and Orbital Servicing economy.

Name: Polymath Robotics
Description: Polymath Robotics makes it radically simple to add autonomous navigation to off-highway vehicles.

Name: R3 Robotics
Description:
R3 Robotics is a European robotics company focused on the automated dismantling of electrified systems at industrial scale. Our mission is to unlock maximum value from end-of-life electric vehicle systems through safe, data-driven, and scalable automation. 

Founded in 2021, R3 Robotics pioneered robotic disassembly and diagnostics for EV batteries, establishing the technological foundation for broader automated dismantling across electrified systems. 

We operate a modular automated dismantling platform that combines robotics, vision systems, and software intelligence to support industrial-scale reuse, recycling, and remanufacturing across the electrification value chain.

Name: Modus Limited
Description: Modus is now Manta.

Name: Circus Group
Description: The Circus Group (XETRA: CA1) is the leading AI robotics company, specialising in the translation of the fine art of cooking into full autonomy. On its mission to fuel humanity, Circus provides global access to balanced nutrition, for everyone, anytime. The company developed the world’s first commercially viable food production robot, Circus Autonomy One.

Name: Furhat Robotics
Description:
Furhat Robotics is robotics startup building social humanoid robots for research and innovation. Grounded in years of research in human-robot interaction, human communication and speech technology, our flagship Furhat Robot provides a customizable platform integrated with the latest face animation, speech and vision models that allow it to carry complex social interactions with people in the real world.

Furhat's core mission is to enable people to easily build real-world use cases  and give robots all the essential social and conversational skills needed to interact with humans just as we interact with each other.

Name: EPFL Robotics
Description:
We’re proud to be ranked as the #1 University in Europe for Robotics, thanks to our research performance measured by citations. Our cutting-edge applied research also places us in the top 15 of technology institutes worldwide, alongside Berkeley, Caltech, Cambridge, Delft, Imperial College, ETH, Harvard, MIT, Oxford, Stanford, NTU, and NUS.  

Our Labs and Centers aim to drive positive social impact by developing the next generation of robotics experts and solutions. We do this through leading-edge research, knowledge exchange, innovative experimentation, industry demos, technology transfer, and through excellence in teaching. Join us!

This page is maintained by Dr. Anca Rusu, EPFL Robotics Community Manager.

Name: Four Growers, Inc.
Description: Four Growers is a YCombinator-backed, Pittsburgh-based robotics startup that is building robots to feed the world. Sitting at the intersection of hardware and software, we bring together the best and brightest from around the world to create innovative products that redefine the agriculture industry, allowing our customers to feed the world more efficiently and sustainably. Our AI robotic harvesting and analytics platform is deployed in commercial farms across the globe and is bringing sustainable, healthy, affordable produce to everyone.

Name: The Bot Company
Description: jobs@bot.co

Name: Fauna Robotics
Description: Robots that live, work, and play by our sides

Name: Titano
Description:
Titano is the European hub for autonomous robotics and intelligent infrastructure.
We design and integrate robotic systems for urban services, security, mobility and media.
We unify technology, automation and data to transform how cities and brands operate in the physical world.

Name: Cellula Robotics Ltd.
Description:
Cellula Robotics Ltd. is a proudly Canadian, privately owned, world-leading marine technology company focused on revolutionizing underwater security through advanced Autonomous Underwater Vehicle (AUV) systems. 

Headquartered in Burnaby, British Columbia with additional offices on the East Coast of Canada and the United States, Cellula employs over 80 dedicated professionals, including highly skilled engineers, designers, and technicians. 

Cellula Robotics Ltd. is driven by a mission to redefine the paradigm of underwater security. By harnessing the potential of cutting-edge AUVs, we aim to change the way the world approaches subsea security. Driven by innovation and industry knowledge, we are committed to crafting sustainable solutions for the defense, mineral exploration, and energy sectors. Our hydrogen fuel cell-powered long range AUVs address evolving demands, propelling us towards a greener future.

Our unyielding commitment to quality is evident through our ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System that not only underscores our dedication to excellence but also reflects our ability to consistently surpass the expectations of our clients.

Name: RobotLAB Inc.
Description: RobotLAB is powering the last mile of robotics and AI, bringing turnkey autonomous solutions, from cleaning and delivery to security and customer service, directly to businesses nationwide and beyond. As the only robotics franchise, we combine proven technology with local expertise, enabling entrepreneurs to deliver cutting-edge automation and unparalleled ROI. Join us in transforming everyday operations and making advanced robotics accessible to every corner of your community.

Name: SYOS Aerospace
Description:
SYOS is a fast-growing global robotics and aerospace company, driving the development of cutting-edge uncrewed vehicles (drones) across air, land, and sea for dual-use applications. We are committed to pushing technological boundaries and delivering exceptional products that consistently exceed customer expectations.

With R&D and headquarters in Mount Maunganui, New Zealand, and European office located in Fareham, UK, Syos is under an intensive growth period.

Name: Gibotech A/S
Description:
Gibotech A/S develops, installs and services high-tech robot and automation solutions for hospitals and industry in all over the world.
 
Our goal is for our customers to optimize and streamline their processes and workflow to benefit from all the advantages that automation provides.
 
Our many years of experience have given us strong contacts in the industry, and through our recognized business partners we can always deliver tailored solutions that take into account the customer's possibilities and limitations. 

By involving the customer in the development process, we ensure optimal solutions for the customer - every time.

Name: temi Robots
Description:
Temi - robots as a service.
Cost effective, 24/7 autonomous staff member, for everyday tasks, and with focus on engagement efficiency.
temi is a multinational robotics company that specializes in Robot as a Service solutions (RaaS), autonomous platforms, Al, smart assistant and cloud-based services.

We develop professional and customer-centric solutions for all segments and customers worldwide including Home, Hospitality, Retails, Medical, Industrial, Commercial and all other relevant applications.

Temi is part of Robocore, the spin-off company of the largest Mistubishi automation solution provider, Tung Hing Enterprise, in China. 

We also develop solutions by integrating smart external sensors on the platforms such as wellness sensors, medical-grade sensors and others.

Apart from service robot, we are cooperating with Verobotics, the facade cleaning robot developer, to promote smart building exterior maintenance, and combining our Robot Management System, Zpine, with the digital twin solutions from Das Intellitech

Name: Flexion Robotics
Description: We are building the autonomy stack for humanoid robots - from command to control, from manipulation to locomotion, across any hardware and task. Leveraging the power of simulation and reinforcement learning, our software scales to the real world with minimal human involvement.

Name: AlgoBotix
Description: AlgoBotix serves in the B2B and B2G space, offering software solutions for the growing global drone industry. As a provider of drone software, the company cater to enterprises involved in drone platform manufacturing and service provisioning. The venture offers software solutions to UAV platform manufacturers, service providers, defence establishments, and several governmental organizations. These solutions cater to a wide range of applications, including aerial transportation, surveillance, agriculture, medical, law enforcement, emergency relief missions, academia, and more.

Name: Multiply Labs
Description: Multiply Labs develops advanced robotic systems that manufacture next-gen therapies at scale. We believe that automation is the key to enable life-saving therapies to reach all the patients who need them. We work with the global leaders in the pharmaceutical and biotech space (see our posts to keep up with the latest commercial announcements). And don't forget to check out our peer-reviewed studies with UCSF and Stanford to review our robots' performance in detail!

Name: Open Navigation LLC
Description: Your ROS 2 and Nav2 experts & Friendly Neighborhood Navigators

Name: Fuzzy Logic Robotics
Description:
Fuzzy Logic was founded by a franco-american team of specialists in command and control of industrial robots. Together, they discovered a radically new paradigm that allows untrained users to easily interact with, control, and program industrial robots for complex applications.

Today, Fuzzy Logic provides an all-in-one and ultra-intuitive software platform, which dramatically simplifies the use of robots and makes industrial robot programming fast, efficient, and cost effective for the low volume, high mix production demands of agile manufacturing.


Our Mission and Conviction:
We help factories power up their competitiveness and autonomy, by making robots adapt to them - not the other way around. Every company, whatever its size, should be able to use industrial robots as a simple, everyday, economical tool accessible to non-experts.

Name: Turf Tank
Description:
At Turf Tank, we make robots that paint lines on sports fields – it's that simple.

Every field, whether it's at a small local school or a professional stadium, deserves to look its best. That's why we've made our technology accessible to facilities of all sizes through flexible subscriptions.

By automating the time-consuming task of line marking, we free up groundskeepers to focus on what they do best – creating amazing playing surfaces that make athletes and communities proud. At Turf Tank, we're not just selling robots; we're helping create perfect fields, save valuable time, and make every game day look professional.

This commitment to excellence has made us the world's highest-rated autonomous line marking solution, with more than 5,500 customers globally trusting our technology. But we're more than just a robot company; we're a team of people passionate about helping groundskeepers and facility managers do their best work. We understand that maintaining sports fields is challenging, and that's exactly why we created Turf Tank.

What truly sets us apart? 
We don't just sell you a robot and wave goodbye. We're here as your partner, with the largest support team in the industry, ready to help whenever you need us. Our subscription model means you get the latest technology without breaking the bank, and we're always just a phone call away with our team of 200+ professionals, including 40+ dedicated support specialists who ensure your success every step of the way

Name: Eureka Robotics
Description:
Empowered by Robotics and AI research from NTU Singapore, MIT, and the University of Tokyo, Eureka Robotics delivers Robotics & AI products, software, and systems to automate tasks that require High Accuracy and High Agility (HAHA).

Eureka’s strengths lie in its proprietary AI & Robotics technologies and extensive industrial deployment experience, with more than 30 million HAHA operations to date in factories worldwide.

With offices in the USA, Japan, Singapore, and Vietnam, Eureka prides itself on helping clients, globally, achieve vastly improved productivity, lower costs, and better safety.

Common uses include AI-based inspection, precision handling, 3D picking, assembly, or dispensing. Eureka’s customers include industry-leading companies such as Toyota, Denso, Bridgestone, Mitsui Fudosan, Sumitomo Bakelite from Japan, or Pratt & Whitney, Coherent, Excelitas from the USA.

Eureka is backed by top global Venture Capital firms.

Name: PetroBot Technologies
Description:
At PetroBot Technologies, we don’t just build robots; we engineer answers to the industry's toughest challenges.

We are a deep-tech robotics company revolutionizing the way the Oil & Gas, Power, and Chemical industries approach Asset Integrity Management. Our mission is to eliminate human risk and operational downtime through the power of automation, AI, and Non-Destructive Testing (NDT).

Our Flagship Innovations: We have developed award-winning, globally certified (ATEX/PESO) robotic platforms that redefine inspection:
ITIS Rover: The solution for In-Service Tank Bottom Inspection (no draining, no sludge removal).
MagRover: Magnetic crawlers for vertical climbing on tanks, vessels, and pipelines.
PetroBot Visualize: Converting complex inspection data into clear, actionable 3D insights using AI.
Open Innovation & Custom R&D: We understand that off-the-shelf products don't solve every problem. We are builders at heart. Beyond our core product line, PetroBot acts as an Agile Innovation Partner for our clients. Do you have a unique inspection challenge or a confined space that is "impossible" to reach? We collaborate directly with asset owners to design, prototype, and deploy custom robotic solutions tailored to specific plant requirements.

Why Partner With Us?
Zero Downtime: Our in-service solutions keep your production running.
Unmatched Safety: We send robots where humans shouldn't go.
Collaborative Engineering: If the tool doesn't exist yet, we will build it for you.
Data Superiority: Replace spot checks with comprehensive data coverage and statistical and AI Analysis.

Whether you need a proven standard solution or a custom R&D breakthrough, PetroBot is your partner in building a safer, more efficient future.

Name: Persona AI
Description: We're hiring talented engineers who can’t wait to put tough humanoids to work. Visit our website to see open positions and apply.

Name: Tethys Robotics
Description:
We develop underwater robots to tackle tasks in challenging environments, focusing on modularity and an innovative omnidirectional control.

Name: ETH Robotics Club
Description:
The ETH Robotics Club is a newly founded student organization at ETH Zurich, created by and for students with a shared passion for robotics.

Our goal is to build a community around hands-on learning and real-world systems in areas such as autonomous drones, humanoid robots, and dexterous manipulation. 

In just the first few months since our launch, we’ve made significant progress. We now count over 200 student members across diverse disciplines, reflecting the strong enthusiasm for robotics at ETH. We are proud to have invited renowned professors such as Marco Hutter and Raffaello D'Andrea to join our advisory board. We’ve also forged partnerships with industry leaders such as NVIDIA, OpenAI and Hugging Face, as well as ETH-affiliated robotics startups and global leaders in venture capital, helping us build strong connections with the broader robotics ecosystem.

We aim to offer students opportunities to learn, experiment, and collaborate on robotics challenges that go beyond the classroom. In time, we hope to grow into a hub for technical development, research collaboration, and student-led innovation.

If you’re a student, researcher, alumnus, or sponsor interested in robotics at ETH, we’d love to hear from you.

As a full-stack autonomy developer, we offer a customized suite of low-level control, cybersecurity, simulation, perception, safeguarded teleoperation, full autonomy, and multi-agent mission planning. 

Our technology allows some of the biggest names in the defense, mining, construction, and security industries to autonomously control and navigate their vehicles through challenging terrain, limited visibility, and GPS-denied environments. 

Are you interested in working for one of the most innovative robotics companies in the world? (Don’t believe us? Check out Fast Company, who named us one of the top-10 worldwide innovative companies in robotics.)

Here are a few things that make us unique:
•	We’re not just a bunch of academics who decided to start a company. We’ve been successful in balancing interesting R&D with core business needs for almost 20 years!
•	We have fun. We try hard to maintain a culture of transparency and mutual respect.
•	You won’t be pigeon-holed. You may start at Neya working on computer vision problems but then move to machine learning or hands-on platform development. We love people who have a breadth of experience, and we want to help you grow your career.

We offer fantastic benefits, including:

•	Health insurance, with no required employee contribution

Name: Control Barrier Functions
Description: Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) are mathematical tools in robotics and control theory used to guarantee a system stays within safe operating regions, preventing undesired behaviors like collisions by constraining control inputs at each time step, often solved via quadratic programming for real-time safety filtering in dynamic systems. They define a "safe set" and use a function to ensure the system's future states remain in this set (forward invariance), making them ideal for ensuring robots avoid obstacles while still performing tasks.

Name: Humotech
Description:
High-performance robotic prostheses and exoskeletons for research, development, rehabilitation, and evaluation.

Humotech’s Caplex system gives you the freedom to explore, experiment, and innovate with less risk and shorter development time. With Caplex, you test your ideas first, then build.

Caplex is a programmable, high-performance system that lets you emulate the real-world physical characteristics of the device or concept you’re evaluating. Unlike a simulation, the user has the physical sensation of wearing different assistive devices (or device modes) while using just one device; they don’t have to switch devices. The devices are lightweight and wearable, because our powerful (and heavy) robotic components are located off-board; users don’t have to carry bulky prototype hardware while they’re testing the device.

Der Ursprung des Unternehmens liegt im Jahr 1955. In 2003 folgte eine schrittweise Neuausrichtung auf die Leichtbaurobotik – mit dem Ziel den Roboter der menschlichen Arbeitswelt näher zu bringen.

Das Unternehmen steht heute für kollaborative stationäre und mobile Robotik, sowie modulare Präzisionsrobotik und Mikrotechnik. Beide Bereiche profitieren von der Einbindung künstlicher Intelligenz, um dem Roboter (Advanced Robotics) menschliche Fähigkeiten näher zu bringen, oder neue Prozesse erst zu ermöglichen.

NEXT robotics befasst sich kontinuierlich mit neuesten Entwicklungen in der Robotertechnik, ist Teil innovativer Forschungsprojekte. Themenfelder wie Technologietransfer, Standardisierung, Modularisierung und Marktentwicklung zählen ebenfalls dazu. Die Entwicklung neuer Denkansätze, modularer Konzepte ist Teil der Unternehmensphilosophie.

Die zunehmende Komplexität innovativer Technologien, wie der künstlichen Intelligenz, erfordert mehr Dialog, der über das eigens initiierte New Technology Network (NTn) angeboten wird. Die  Intention ist ein besseres Verständnis, mehr Raum für neue Lösungskonzepte, um technische Herausforderungen gemeinsam erfolgreich meistern zu können.

Our team, which has carried out many pioneering and innovative projects in the field of maritime since its establishment, closely follows the developments in the sector and new demands in the market. Name: Fabrica AI
Description:
Fabrica AI is creating a future where ideating and developing a robot for any task takes days, not years. We believe that by training end to end controls in simulation with reinforcement learning and above that iterating hardware designs, we can automate the whole development process. 

To validate our approaches for our AI system and to collect data, we invented an automatic tile grouting robot that boosts productivity by up to 5x and are piloting it on construction sites in Singapore managed by Woh Hup, BHCC, Gin Chia, Soilbuild, Chan Rong Fen, and Dragages. Tile grouting is the process of filling up the gaps between tiles after the tiles have been laid. We invented a patented robot that is able to automatically grout and clean tile gaps with only a press of a button. 

We’ve raised over 3m USD from Hoxton Ventures, Credo Ventures, our Professor from Cambridge University, Woh Hup, ffVC, and the owner of BHCC (listed construction company). We’ve 2500sqft of space in Singapore where we have over 20 team members, and 1200sqft of space in Czechia where we have our software team.

Organizujemy regularne szkolenia i warsztaty, nie tylko w zakresie doboru środków czystości, ale przede wszystkim w zakresie wdrażania i eksploatacji technologii robotycznych.

W ostatnich latach, nasze osiągnięcia w dziedzinie robotyzacji i Smart Cleaning zostały uhonorowane wieloma prestiżowymi nagrodami branżowymi, co świadczy o naszej niekwestionowanej pozycji jako pioniera tej dziedziny. Dążymy nie tylko do bycia liderem, ale także do stania się wzorem w zakresie odpowiedzialności ekologicznej i zrównoważonego rozwoju. Kastell to nie tylko marka, to wizja przyszłości nowoczesnego sprzątania.

Name: Digital Concepts Engineering Ltd
Description:
Since 2017, Digital Concepts Engineering have been developing and deploying solutions directly related to the conversion of vehicles and platforms to remote control, and are regarded as global leaders in Uncrewed Vehicle technology. Using our own high reliability, low latency control system, MarionetteTM, we have successfully converted a range of legacy platforms, including Armoured Fighting Vehicles such as FV510 Warrior, the US HMMWV, assorted trucks, 4x4s, 6 and 8 wheeled platforms, bomb disposal robots and bespoke uncrewed vehicles. Once converted, these platforms can be driven manually by an operator, either from within the vehicle or remotely, or via an AI interface, allowing autonomous operations. 
MarionetteTM is essentially a toolbox of vehicle or payload interface modules, controlling the engine, transmission, steering, braking, and other vehicle functions along with a variety of payloads, from digital sensors to hydraulic manipulators. This allows extremely rapid vehicle conversions, down to around six weeks from vehicle arrival in our workshops. MarionetteTM can also be used to replace or upgrade obsolete control systems, extending the life of otherwise solid platforms, as demonstrated on the Wheelbarrow EOD robots.
Recent work has focused on reducing round-trip control system latency to levels that facilitate high speed teleoperation (100kph), developing a universal control interface that can be used by human or AI controller, and study and development of alternative communications (radio and Free Space Optics) specifically for control of UGVs, along with First Person View (FPV) control at high speeds.
DCE also design and manufacture our own range of UGVs. Called “X-Series” these platforms range from 300kg and come in many variants, including reconnaissance, carriage, and fully submersible “bottom crawlers”. They are powerful, reliable, and cost effective, and have been used in several defence, agriculture, and nuclear decommissioning roles.

Forte des 15 ans d’expertise du groupe NGX Robotics, la marque de robotique et d'IA, Running Brains Robotics, a été créée pour répondre aux problématiques de sécurité des sites industriels et des sites sensibles.

 Running Brains Robotics propose aujourd'hui le GR100, premier robot de surveillance autonome dédié à l’inspection des installations sur sites sécurisés.

La force du Robot GR100 est d’opérer deux métiers en simultané : 
 La sûreté : surveillance et détection d’intrus
 La sécurité : traitement d’images intelligent, mesures thermiques et autres capteurs… 

Il patrouille en extérieur de façon complétement autonome, de jour comme de nuit, et ce, quelles que soient les conditions climatiques. 

Nous avons conçu le robot GR100, pour automatiser les tâches récurrentes et pénibles des agents de sécurité. 

Grâce à son système de détection intelligent et autonome, le robot alerte les opérateurs en cas de situation anormale.

En plus de la surveillance des installations, celui-ci assure la sécurité des opérateurs en qualifiant les menaces en amont. Les agents peuvent alors procéder à une levée de doute avec l’aide du robot. 

Le Robot GR100 est Made in France. Il est entièrement conçu, produit et fabriqué en France par nos équipes.

 Chez Running Brains Robotics, nous mettons à disposition de nos clients une offre de services complète, incluant l’assistance 24h/24 7j/7, la maintenance et les évolutions hardware et software. 
À noter que le ROI du robot est rapide et mesurable.

**Ce projet a été financé par l'Etat dans le cadre de France 2030

Description:
At mobotics , we are at the forefront of innovation in robotics and electronics. Our mission is to shape the future by providing cutting-edge development and comprehensive training solutions. Since our establishment in 2006 by our visionary founder, Tarjinder Tarun, we have specialized in designing advanced robotic systems and state-of-the-art electronic devices, empowering businesses and individuals to stay ahead in a rapidly evolving technological landscape.

What We Do
Advanced Robotic Systems: We create sophisticated robotic solutions that push the boundaries of automation and efficiency.
State-of-the-Art Electronic Devices: Our electronics are designed with the latest technology, ensuring high performance and reliability.
Our Services
Innovative Projects: Our expert team delivers excellence through groundbreaking projects tailored to meet the unique needs of our clients.
Hands-On Training Programs: We offer comprehensive training solutions that equip individuals and businesses with the skills needed to thrive in the tech industry.
Industry-Leading Expertise: Our team's extensive knowledge and experience ensure that we remain at the forefront of technological advancements.
Areas of Expertise
PCB 3D Printing: Revolutionizing the way electronic circuits are designed and manufactured, enhancing both speed and flexibility.
Automation: Implementing automated solutions to increase efficiency, reduce costs, and improve accuracy in various industrial processes.
Electrical Engineering: Providing innovative electrical engineering solutions that meet the highest standards of quality and safety.
IoT-Based Projects: Creating interconnected systems that leverage the power of the Internet of Things to provide smart, data-driven solutions.
By integrating these cutting-edge technologies, we ensure our clients and partners remain at the technological forefront, ready to harness the opportunities of tomorrow. Join us in pioneering the future of technology.

Name: Autoxing Robotics
Description:
Autoxing Robotics is an intelligent robotics service provider with autonomous driving technology at its core. Founded by a team with over 20 years of deep expertise in mapping, navigation, and autonomous driving and AI, the company brings years of experience in AI-powered navigation and robotic automation.

We focus on the deployment and commercialization of fully autonomous, unmanned robots and forklifts, offering intelligent mobile platforms for a wide range of industries. Leveraging our years of expertise in artificial intelligence, positioning and navigation, and big data, our products are widely applied in the manufacturing sector such as factories, and logistics centers, warehouses, as well as restaurants, hotels, office buildings, and more, providing tailored robotic mobility solutions for diverse business needs.

Our self-developed autonomous mobile robots feature no site modifications, easy deployment, dynamic obstacle avoidance, free navigation, and seamless IoT device integration. They deliver centimeter-level positioning accuracy, maintain reliable localization even in complex and dynamic environments, and support multi-robot fleet coordination and integration with third-party management systems. AutoXing Robotics empowers industrial automation with fast, seamless, and intelligent delivery and management solutions across all operational stages.

Name: IntBot
Description: We believe technology should support humans. IntBot creates robots that help guests feel welcomed, understood, and at ease. From multilingual support to expressive gestures, our robots are designed to elevate the guest experience in hospitality environments worldwide.

Name: SCANLOX
Description:
SCANLOX specializes in optimizing production logistics through the automation of internal transport. We work closely with our customers to analyze and identify opportunities for improvement, using innovative technologies such as AI and 3D scanning to increase efficiency and safety in  logistics processes. 

Our approach is based on simplicity and flexibility, enabling rapid implementation and adaptation to changing business needs. By staying at the forefront of technological development, we help our customers streamline their operations and create value through smarter and more innovative automation solutions.

Let us explore the future of logistics together with advanced automation.

Name: Zukunft Robots Private Limited
Description:
Welcome to Zukunft Robots, where innovation drives automation to transform industries. We're dedicated to revolutionizing manufacturing, logistics, and agriculture through advanced robotics solutions.

Zukunft Robots is a forward-thinking startup focused on pushing the boundaries of robotics technology. With our team of passionate engineers and developers, we're committed to creating solutions that streamline processes, boost productivity, and drive efficiency for businesses worldwide.

What We Offer:
Development Boards: Customizable hardware for building IoT devices and robotic systems.

Robotics as a Service (RaaS): Subscription-based access to robotic systems without upfront costs.

Software as a Service (SaaS): Cloud-based software for robotics control, monitoring, and analytics.

IoT Services: Integration of IoT sensors for predictive maintenance and process optimization.

Cloud Computing: Scalable infrastructure for indoor automation applications.
Data Analytics: Advanced insights from sensor data to optimize operations.

We envision a future where industries thrive with the help of robotics and automation. By embracing innovation, businesses can unlock new opportunities, drive growth, and create a more sustainable future.

Ready to elevate your business with robotics and automation? Contact us to learn more about our solutions and how Zukunft Robots can help you achieve your goals.

Join us as we redefine industries with cutting-edge robotics solutions.

Name: AI Incorporated
Description:
At AI Incorporated, the pun is intentional: “Incorporated” is used in its second meaning—embodied. Our name reflects our mission to take artificial intelligence out of the abstract and embody it in robotics—AI that doesn’t just compute, but also moves, senses, and acts in the real world.

AI Incorporated is one of only a handful of companies globally to deliver a commercialized, AI-driven navigation stack that runs in real time on lightweight hardware, protected by 300+ granted patents.

Our AI researchers focus on topics such as simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM), machine learning, computer vision, and many more. Our technology integrators have a collective background in robotics and mechatronics with a solid foundation in software, hardware, mechanical, and industrial design. Together, we're developing products ranging from robot vacuum cleaners and automated refuse bins, to larger products like automated vehicle lifts.

Name: Robots For Humanity
Description:
We are ready to train the workforce of the future.

Our Mission

At Robots For Humanity, we are driving a responsible and ethical transition towards automation with humanoid robots. 

Our goal is to train the workforce of the future. 

We believe in a future where dangerous and physically demanding work is optional, and where people can redefine and transition their roles to the new jobs of the future.

Name: Versatile Robotics
Description: Versatile Robotics delivers groundbreaking control software powered by the patented MPTC method, providing a unique solution for compliantly controlled robots. Our technology addresses major challenges like instability, imprecision, and high tuning efforts that have long hindered the adoption of such robots. It enables flexible, safe, and efficient interactions with people and objects. Seamlessly integrating into existing infrastructures with minimal adaptation, our solution offers customers a fast return on investment and boosts sales potential for manufacturers. By redefining the market for compliantly controlled robotics, we unlock new possibilities for industrial applications, including cobots, service robots, care, and medical robotics. Additionally, our technology is well-suited for advancing general-purpose robots, paving the way for broader applications across industries.

Name: Roboligent
Description: Roboligent is a robotics company that designs and manufactures robots that interact closely with humans. Our vision is to increase productivity and public benefits by widely disseminating our interactive robotic technology.

Name: Tau Robotics

Name: Useabot
Description:
Useabot (short for Use Cases and Robots) is a value-added distributor and deployment partner helping businesses identify and integrate the right robots for their needs. We collaborate directly with leading robot manufacturers across the United States and worldwide to deliver cutting-edge automation solutions for hospitality, healthcare, education, retail, transportation, and commercial environments, including restaurants, hotels, hospitals, senior living facilities, airports, and malls.

Our goal is simple: to make robotics accessible, profitable, and practical for real-world use. Through complimentary consultations, we help clients choose the most effective robot models for their operations and provide tailored recommendations based on space, budget, and use case.

Whether you’re equipping a restaurant, hotel, healthcare facility, or large public venue, our certified Robot Deployment Specialists are ready to train your team and ensure successful setup—remotely or on-site anywhere in the United States.

As a trusted distributor, Useabot maintains active partnerships with major manufacturers such as Keenon Robotics and Temi, ensuring our customers receive direct access to technical expertise, warranty support, and next-generation product lines as they launch.

We also build and support a national reseller network that empowers dealers, integrators, and entrepreneurs to offer robotic solutions in their local markets while leveraging our manufacturer relationships, logistics, and deployment team.

Our dedicated support team is available 24/7 to assist clients and partners. In the rare case we are unavailable, our manufacturer partners remain easily reachable, ensuring continuous assistance and reliable service for every robot we deploy.

Name: Swift Robotics
Description: Swift, established in 2019, is a fast growing and innovative robotics company based in London, UK and Mumbai, India. Swift specializes in manufacturing autonomous indoor delivery robots that cater to the distinctive needs of hospitals encompassing tasks such as transporting medicines, medical instruments, sustenance, among others.

Name: ReductStore
Description:
ReductStore is a software company building next-generation data infrastructure for robotics and industrial IoT (IIoT). Our mission is to simplify how teams collect, store, and manage massive volumes of multimodal data—from the edge to the cloud.

We enable organizations to stream, store, and retrieve raw data like sensor readings, images, logs, and ROS bags with high performance and minimal overhead. Designed for speed, reliability, and cost-efficiency, ReductStore helps engineers unlock the full value of their data for analytics, diagnostics, and AI applications.

Name: Optima Robotics - Australia and India

Name: Amidon Heavy Industries
Description:
Amidon Heavy Industries builds uncrewed inspection systems for subsea infrastructure. Our surface platforms deploy robotic vehicles to inspect fiber cables, pipelines, and offshore power assets without the need for ships or crew.

We combine modular hardware with a software platform that delivers real-time data, digital twins, and actionable reports. This approach enables faster detection, continuous monitoring, and a step-change in cost and reliability compared to traditional vessel-based operations.

Our goal is simple: make subsea visibility routine, affordable, and always available. Whether you operate a global telecom network or critical energy infrastructure, we help you see and manage what's happening beneath the surface.

KPEK For Smart Home Solutions is your trusted partner in transforming traditional houses into intelligent, secure, and energy-efficient homes. We specialize in cutting-edge smart home systems that provide full control, convenience, and peace of mind — anytime, anywhere.

From smart lighting, automated curtains, and voice-controlled appliances, to advanced security features like gas/water leak detection, surveillance systems, and smart door locks — we bring future-ready technology to your doorstep. Avdeso Academy & Robotics

Name: Fictionlab
Description:
Fictionlab specializes in mobile robotics, providing the hardware and expertise that power the world’s most advanced research and development projects. We focus on the design and manufacture of autonomous Unmanned Ground Vehicles (UGVs) specifically engineered to serve as versatile, open platforms for specialized R&D applications.

Our flagship platforms, Leo Rover and Raph Rover, are designed with a modular, open-source philosophy. This allows researchers to bypass basic hardware development and focus immediately on high-level innovation in sectors such as:

Space Exploration: Testing lunar and planetary exploration technologies.
Defense & Security: Developing unmanned tactical and surveillance solutions.
Precision Agriculture: Innovating in autonomous crop monitoring and soil analysis.
Technical Inspections: Navigating hazardous or hard-to-reach industrial environments.

Beyond our platforms, Fictionlab provides expert engineering services, including customization and ground-up design of robotic systems. Our technology is the trusted R&D foundation for global space agencies, armed forces, and prestigious academic institutions and commercial projects.

Name: DRZ - Deutsches Rettungsrobotik-Zentrum e.V.
Description:
Our vision is that helpful robotic systems in the air, at sea and on land will make the everyday lives of civil emergency response teams safer. This is because in particularly dangerous situations (earthquakes, CBRNe, etc.), robots and BOS drones can be deployed in such a way that human emergency services do not have to be put at additional risk.

To this end, rescue robotics must be researched, developed and learnt so that they can be deployed successfully. The DRZ e.V. is the world's largest network for rescue robotics! We bring together application, research and companies to work together on the real deployment of the future - with robotic support.

Researching rescue robotics...
...for us at the DRZ means participating in research projects as a fully-fledged partner. We have already done this several times at national and international level. But we are also happy to take on contract research. Just get in touch with us!

Developing rescue robotics...
...for us means offering companies our 2,800 square metre "Living Lab" with its diverse structures and possible uses. But for us it also means carrying out trials and tests on commission. We would be happy to prepare a customised offer.

Learning rescue robotics...
...for us means offering training courses for civil emergency response teams. This involves not only flying robots, but also ground robotics and water robotics. (Our courses are currently only available in German.)

Using rescue robotics...
...for us means subjecting innovative technology to the endurance test of real operations. Our "Robotics Task Force - under construction" has already been involved in several operations in co-operation with the Dortmund fire brigade (telecommunication train).

Name: GMT Robotics
Description:
GMT Robotics was created from a vision of changing the rebar industry. But as we set sails and began our journey, we quickly discovered, that our vision would not only change the industry, but completely reshape it.


GMT Robotics is built upon 35+ years of experience within rebar machine manufacturing and selling. 

In 2010, Ulrich Deichmann left Pedax. The company he had help built and shape since the 80ties. After that, Ulrich decided to remain connected to the industry he had helped shape over all the years and therefor started to deal with second hand rebar equipment in the company he founded and named “German Machine Trade” (GMT). 

Today à “Global Machine Trade”, and over the years it has become the world’s leading reseller of refurbished second-hand equipment on the global western market.

In 2015 Thomas Dall-Hansen joins Ulrich in GMT, and after traveling the world and understanding the rebar industry he soon realized that the industry had a lot of untapped potential, and that automation could be the way forward for the industry.

– It was clear that the focus should not be on rebar steel processing, but rather handling and assembly of rebar.

In 2018 Thomas and Ulrich started to investigate markets and started to look outside the industry for solutions which could be modified and implemented into our industry. With the support from clients, suppliers, software developers, robot manufactures, etc. Our 4 core products were born: 

“WeldMate”, “PickMate”, “Micro ARCAS” and “Dwall ARCAS”.

In 2020 GMT Robotics was established. In the same year, the market and trusted clients showed us the support and we started manufacturing of all 4 solutions.

All this could of course never have happened without some of the best people and employees supporting the journey that Ulrich and Thomas started.

Description: Hospital-acquired infections (HAIs) affect 7–10% of patients and cause over 25 million extra hospital days each year in Europe alone. The cost: up to €24 billion.
